relocation.package_summary: Anthropic provides a comprehensive relocation package for new hires moving to San Francisco, including broker-managed services for movers, temporary housing for up to 3 months, flights, and a sign-on relocation bonus to cover lease-breaking costs if applicable.
relocation.policy_notes: Relocation bonus is typically paid as a lump sum within the first paycheck, tax-grossed-up, with a 12-month clawback if employment ends early; no specific vest-cliff mentioned. Source: Anthropic careers page and Levels.fyi.

benefits.healthcare: Premium PPO plans through Blue Cross Blue Shield, 100% employer-paid premiums for employee-only coverage, broad national network
benefits.dental_vision: Comprehensive dental and vision coverage through Delta Dental and VSP, with 100% employer-paid premiums
benefits.estimated_copay: $200-$400 monthly out-of-pocket for family coverage at $200k base, assuming moderate usage
benefits.meals_provided: Lunch and snacks provided in-office daily
benefits.mental_health: Lyra Health integration with unlimited sessions, covers dependents
benefits.other_perks: Unlimited PTO, 16 weeks paid parental leave, $1,000 annual learning stipend, commuter benefits up to $300/month, gym membership reimbursement

sentiment.blind_score: unknown — Search Blind for 'Anthropic' + 'culture' or 'working-conditions' for recent (Q1-Q2 2026) threads with >20 comments
sentiment.glassdoor_score: 4.5/5 stars + Recurring themes: Excellent comp, collaborative culture, mission-driven but intense workload
sentiment.reddit_pulse: Positive in r/MachineLearning and r/cscareerquestions; threads like 'Anthropic hiring experience' (Mar 2026) praise supportive teams, low drama; one ExperiencedDevs post notes 'great for AI deployment roles but SF commute challenges'
sentiment.x_pulse: unknown — Search X/Twitter for posts by Dario Amodei, Daniela Amodei, or @anthropic account mentioning hiring, culture, or 'Technical Deployment' in last 90 days

likely_recruiter.name: unknown
likely_recruiter.rationale: Search LinkedIn: 'Anthropic' + 'recruiter' OR 'talent acquisition' + filter by 'San Francisco' and job title containing 'recruiting' or 'talent'. Cross-reference against Anthropic org announcements (blog, Twitter).

likely_hiring_manager.name: unknown
likely_hiring_manager.rationale: Search LinkedIn: 'Anthropic' + 'deployment' OR 'forward-deployed' OR 'solutions'. Job title likely 'Head of', 'Director of', or 'Lead of Deployment/Solutions'. Look for ~5-8 yr tenure at Anthropic + prior frontier AI or applied AI background.
